description: Cerbos is an authorization platform for defining and enforcing fine-grained access-control policies across applications, services, and AI agents. It includes a policy decision point, a central management plane called Cerbos Hub, and related tooling for policy deployment and audit visibility.
summary: Cerbos exposes a self-hosted/publicly callable PDP HTTP API plus two CLIs (`cerbos` and `cerbosctl`); no public GraphQL API or Cerbos-hosted MCP server endpoint was found.
